narrative:
New Richmond Village B (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,342 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
